decisionRules: Proceed with behavior tuning only when a deterministic bug exists or current behavior materially harms level usefulness across multiple real-cache symbols.
Require fixture coverage and explicit before/after expectations before any generation behavior change.
Defer high-risk behavior changes when review findings are diagnostic but no production bug is proven.
Prefer audit, enrichment, documentation, and baseline-lock gates over generation changes until stronger evidence exists.
Any future behavior tuning must change one knob per gate.

decisionMatrix.currentEvidence: No resistance extension coverage on DEVS, AIM, and HCWB; limited downside extension coverage on DEVS, ENVX, and YMAT; extension fixtures lock no-fabrication, spacing, and synthetic behavior.
decisionMatrix.potentialBenefit: May improve forward extension coverage when real candidates exist.

decisionMatrix.currentEvidence: Seven symbols report clustered_level_areas_present; QUBT, AAOI, and PHOE are dense review cases without audit cluster diagnostics; density fixtures lock sparse, clustered, separated, and nearest-preservation behavior.
decisionMatrix.potentialBenefit: May reduce near-duplicate clutter and improve inspection ergonomics.

decisionMatrix.currentEvidence: HCWB and PHOE have wide nearest support and resistance gaps; factual audit diagnostics already describe the coverage gaps.
decisionMatrix.potentialBenefit: Could improve nearby map coverage if real candidates are being missed.

decisionMatrix.currentEvidence: Enrichment mapping and audit wording hardening are merged; reruns show diagnostic semantics and enrichment breakdown are present and factual-only.
decisionMatrix.potentialBenefit: Improves explainability without changing generated levels.

decisionMatrix.currentEvidence: Supplied IBKR 15m facts validate cleanly and remain outside LevelEngine provider metadata and support/resistance generation.
decisionMatrix.potentialBenefit: May later add context for quality or future multi-timeframe behavior.

decisionMatrix.currentEvidence: Synthetic rows appear on AAOI and PHOE, remain clearly marked, and are separated from historical evidence and synthetic enrichment gaps.
decisionMatrix.potentialBenefit: May improve forward-planning completeness if policy is tuned carefully.

futureTuningRules: Name the expected output diff before implementation.
Preserve or explicitly document nearest support/resistance changes.
Compare bucket counts, extension counts, synthetic markings, diagnostics, and diagnostic semantics before and after.
Keep 15m outside LevelEngine unless a separate design gate changes that boundary.
Include deterministic fixtures and a compact real-cache rerun.
Do not introduce grading, coaching, P/L, giveback, behavior scoring, recommendations, or trade advice.
